name: Apple Filled Squash Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Cut each squash in half and remove seeds and fibers. Place cut sides down in an ungreased baking pan.
3. Add water to reach a depth of 1/4 inch. Bake, uncovered, until squash is tender (about 30-40 minutes).
4. Cook and stir meat in a large skillet until brown. Remove from heat and stir in salt, cinnamon, chopped apples, and raisins.
5. When squash is cooked, turn cut sides up. Scoop out pulp leaving a shell about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Season shells with salt. Mix mashed pulp with meat mixture and return to shells, piling full.
7. Sprinkle with brown sugar and drizzle with melted butter. Bake until apples are tender (about 20-30 minutes).
8. Serve hot.
